notes: Index of R = |A/R| (def:quotient-set), the cardinality/number of classes. MISSING-VOCABULARY FLAG: there is no standalone def:cardinality node (cardinality is only relational here -- def:same-cardinality for ~ and def:cardinality-order for <=). So |A/R| as a cardinal-number is routed to def:same-cardinality, the closest available cardinality notion; a dedicated def:cardinality node would be the precise dep. Kept as-is.
